title: Wiki Quality Validator Implementation Plan
description: tools/wiki validate-page와 lint를 구현하기 위한 실행 계획.

page.humanSummary: 다음 구현은 MCP나 ingest가 아니라 deterministic validator와 lint부터 진행한다.
page.agentSummary: Implement tests first, then tools/wiki parser, schema validator, link/index/log/provenance checks, CLI, report output, and final verification.

body.goal: 현재 vault가 품질 스키마를 실제로 강제하도록 tools/wiki validate-page와 lint 명령을 구현한다.
body.architecture: A small Python CLI coordinates focused library modules. Tests define malformed and valid wiki pages. The CLI reads but does not mutate wiki files unless a future apply command is explicitly added.

workerInstructions.note: 각 slice는 failing test를 먼저 만들고, 통과 구현 후 전체 검증을 실행한다.

scopeCheck.assessment: 단일 repo-local tooling 작업이다. MCP, ingest automation, raw parsing은 제외한다.
scopeCheck.decomposition: Parser/schema, links/index/log/provenance, CLI/reporting, docs alignment 순서로 나눈다.

body.currentState: 품질 스키마와 baseline pages가 존재하고, tools/wiki에는 validate-page와 lint 명령이 구현되어 있다. Current vault lint는 exit 0으로 통과한다.
body.targetState: 구현된 validator baseline을 유지하고, 다음 단계에서는 apply-draft 또는 source hashing을 별도 Stenc plan으로 다룬다.

in: README/tools docs updates if command usage changes

fileStructure.responsibility: Command routing, exit codes, output formatting.

slices.title: Parser and schema validation

files.role: Failing tests for missing frontmatter, missing required fields, and invalid enum values.
Markdown parser for YAML frontmatter block and body.

steps.title: Write failing tests
steps.instruction: Add unittest cases that prove missing frontmatter, missing quality fields, and invalid type/status/confidence values fail validation.
steps.expected: Tests fail because validator modules do not exist or behavior is not implemented.

steps.title: Implement parser and schema validator
steps.instruction: Implement minimal deterministic parsing and schema validation needed to satisfy the tests. Do not implement link or provenance logic in this slice.

steps.title: Verify green
steps.instruction: Run focused tests and baseline tests.

doneWhen: Existing baseline quality test still passes.

slices.title: Link, index, log, and provenance checks

files.role: Add failing tests for broken links, log format, and provenance signals.

steps.title: Add failing structural tests
steps.instruction: Test broken wiki links, missing index coverage for core pages, invalid log event prefix, and quality.provenance mismatch with body evidence signals.
steps.expected: New tests fail until link and lint orchestration are implemented.

steps.title: Implement validators
steps.instruction: Implement link extraction, wiki path resolution, log prefix validation, and basic provenance signal checks. Keep claim truth arbitration out of scope.

steps.title: Verify current vault
steps.instruction: Run tests and ensure current wiki baseline has no lint issues under the implemented checks.

doneWhen: Broken links are detected in tests.

slices.title: CLI and report output

files.role: Add report rendering for lint results.
Add CLI behavior tests where practical.

steps.title: Add CLI tests
steps.instruction: Test that validate-page returns exit code 0 for a valid page and non-zero for an invalid temporary fixture. Test lint can run against the current repo.
steps.expected: CLI tests fail until cli.py exists.

steps.title: Implement CLI commands
steps.instruction: Implement argparse-based validate-page and lint commands. Print concise output grouped by severity and path.

steps.title: Implement lint report
steps.instruction: Add optional report writing to scratch/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-lint.md. The report must be human-readable and include counts, issue groups, and applied fixes as none.

doneWhen: python3 tools/wiki/cli.py lint exits 0 on the current vault.
A lint report can be generated without mutating wiki pages.

slices.title: Documentation alignment and final verification

files.role: Document actual commands and current limitations.
Point users to lint command if appropriate.

steps.title: Update command docs
steps.instruction: Document validate-page, lint, expected exit codes, and what the validator intentionally does not decide.

steps.title: Run final verification
steps.instruction: Run all required verification commands and inspect git diff.
steps.command: python3 -m unittest tests/test_wiki_quality_baseline.py tests/test_wiki_tools.py && python3 tools/wiki/cli.py lint && git diff --check

doneWhen: lint passes on the current vault.

risks.risk: YAML parsing becomes too clever or too weak.
risks.mitigation: Start with constrained frontmatter shapes used by this vault; add PyYAML only if tests prove the constrained parser is insufficient.
Limit provenance checks to evidence signals and review flags. Human review resolves contested truth.
This plan only implements validation and report writing. Auto-fix and apply-draft remain out of scope.

validation.purpose: Confirm rendered pages exist for Stenc JSON sources.
Confirm current quality baseline remains valid.

agentInstructions: Follow executionOrder unless new evidence invalidates a slice.
Use TDD for each implementation slice.
Do not implement MCP, ingest, or auto-fix behavior in this plan.
Before claiming completion, run the full verification command from slice-4.

selfReviewChecks.name: Spec coverage
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm every spec requirement maps to a slice or explicit out-of-scope decision.

selfReviewChecks.name: No placeholders
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm each step contains a concrete file, command, or implementation instruction.

selfReviewChecks.name: Quality-first sequencing
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm lint and validation land before ingest or MCP.

options.label: Inline Execution
options.description: Execute the plan in this session with TDD and verification gates.

options.label: Subagent-Driven
options.description: Dispatch separate workers for parser/schema and link/lint slices after slice ownership is clear.

supportingSections.heading: No Placeholders
supportingSections.content: Every implementation step should leave a runnable command, a concrete module, or a test assertion.
items: Do not add empty functions for future work.
Do not mark unsupported checks as passing.
Do not call the validator complete until it fails on bad fixtures and passes on the current vault.

supportingSections.heading: Next Handoff
supportingSections.content: After this plan is complete, the next architectural step is apply-draft or ingest planning, not MCP.
items: apply-draft should consume structured semantic drafts.
MCP should wrap stable CLI commands only after local behavior settles.

openQuestions: Should lint report writing be enabled by default or only behind --report?
